title: An Act to Allow a Municipality to Waive the Excise Tax on an Antique Automobile Owned by a Person 65 Years of Age or Older
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 20, 2025
last_house_action: 4/22/2025 - The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/20/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on TAXATION suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on TAXATION Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
